text:
DISCHARGES 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
FILE(S): 
Hospital 
SOURCE: 
AHCAH facility-submitted data 
VALUES: 
0─### 
COMMENT: 
The data submission period represents the data submission for the previous month or week. Data 
submissions are due to CMS by midnight of Wednesday for the previous week or month; therefore, 
submission dates may be a few days after the last day of the week or month. 
There are two tiers of experience (assigned by CMS during evaluation of the facility’s waiver 
submission)
